cross_task_contrast: Same four-condition admissibility predicate as the cylinder-flow case study; the typed inadmissibility structure differs because the physics differs. Incompressible continuity is DEFERRED on cylinder (valid physics, uncalibratable floor) but REJECTED here (invalid physics, compressible flow) --- a different verdict TYPE produced by the same gate on a second task.
task: DeepMind airfoil / SU2 compressible transonic flow
